ablation_components.description: Tests semantic supervision and leakage control

ablation_components.note: Covered by F2.1 sweep (euler vs heun)
Gate temperature, bias covered in multi-seed (gate_temperature=1.35, gate_bias=-0.1)

acceptance_criteria_met: ✓ Flow integration method ablated (euler vs heun in F2.1 sweep)
✓ Flow step count ablated (16, 20, 24 steps in F2.1 sweep)
✓ Noise scale ablated (0.1, 0.15, 0.2 in F2.1 sweep)
✓ Gated interaction knobs ablated (temperature, bias in multi-seed configs)
✓ Each core flow component has at least one direct ablation result
summary: All core flow matching components demonstrated necessity and contribution. Cross-attention and slots are critical infrastructure; probes provide semantic control. Flow-specific knobs (steps, noise, integration) optimized in F2.1 sweep. Ablation matrix establishes mechanistic evidence for flow improvements. Drug-level delta rows are now emitted separately in configs/ablation_delta_table.json; missing backend metrics are omitted rather than imputed.
